rows.label: qev011701_MSG0001
rows.name: Heyyyy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0002
rows.name: Umm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0003
rows.name: Hellooooo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0004
rows.name: Excuse me! Um... Anyone will do~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, if I had a choice, a nice
person would be better, but~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0006
rows.name: Is anyone there~? Help meee...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_JNK0010
rows.name: Respond

rows.label: qev011701_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer the voice.

rows.label: qev011701_JNK0020
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev011701_SEL0021
rows.name: Walk away in silence.

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0007
rows.name: Eh...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0008
rows.name: A... Ahhh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0009
rows.name:
I got a response! It's
finally heeeeeere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm sorry, I'm sorry! I know you must be
suuuper busy, and I know this looks like
a suuuper suspicious situation, but~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0011
rows.name:
Could you think of it as doing a good
deed and just hear me out for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0012
rows.name:
To be blunt, I'm in a
really tight spot here~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0013
rows.name: Please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0014
rows.name: Huh...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0015
rows.name: Huhuhuh~?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0016
rows.name:
Your footsteps are getting quieter...
Your presence is fading away~?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Wait~! If there really is a
person there, please wait![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0018
rows.name:
Could you think of it as doing a good
deed and just hear me out for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0019
rows.name:
To be blunt, I'm in a
really tight spot here~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0020
rows.name: Please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0021
rows.name:
Ah, thank goodness...
Someone actually passed by.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0022
rows.name:
I thought my life was just
going to end right here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0023
rows.name: ...Wait, huh...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0024
rows.name: Is that voice... Senpai?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0025
rows.name: Wow, no way. It really is Senpai...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0026
rows.name:
I feel like this is destiny! To think the
person who passes by while I'm in such a
critical situation is you, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0027
rows.name:
That's right~! It's a huge
crisis, just like it looks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0028
rows.name:
I crossed over to this continent,
and at first my investigation
was going smoothly, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0029
rows.name:
It seems I wandered into a dangerous
area without even realizing it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Before I knew it, my Doll was destroyed,
and I basically got captured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ever since then, these strange aliens
have been doing this and that to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0032
rows.name:
They kept repeating experiments on
me that are too terrifying or
embarrassing to even talk about...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Ah, if you really want to know the details of
the experiments, or if you have those kinds of
hobbies, Senpai, I might consider telling you, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0034
rows.name:
Anyway, after all that, I ended
up locked in here like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0035
rows.name: So please, save me~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0036
rows.name:
The one constantly monitoring
me always seems to be an alien
wearing a blue suit, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0037
rows.name:
They must be the one holding something
like the key to this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0038
rows.name: I'm begging you, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0039
rows.name:
Steal the key back from that blue-suited
alien and rescue me from here~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0040
rows.name: Please~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0041
rows.name: Excuse me~...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0042
rows.name:
I'm sorry to rush you, but... Could
you get me out of here soon~?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0043
rows.name:
Please steal the key back
from the blue-suited alien~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0044
rows.name: I'm begging you~...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0045
rows.name: I'm... I'm... I'm saaaaaaaaved![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0046
rows.name:
I don't even know how many days
it's been since I was outside~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0047
rows.name: Senpai! Thank you so, so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0048
rows.name:
Even though they did this and that
to me in their experiments...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0049
rows.name:
If you hadn't come, Senpai, who knows
what else they would have done to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0050
rows.name:
Anyway... I need to get back to
NLA and report to Walter-kyoukan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0051
rows.name:
I don't really want to report
on the experiments where they
did this and that to me, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0052
rows.name:
I did completely ruin a Doll, so I
can't just keep quiet about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0053
rows.name:
After all... I just sort of
borrowed it without asking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0054
rows.name:
And besides... I'm still an
apprentice BLADE, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0055
rows.name:
I can't just ignore a threat to NLA. I
mean, ideally I'd just charge in alone[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0056
rows.name:
and easily crush an
organization or two, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0057
rows.name:
I'll leave that as a
goal for the future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0058
rows.name:
The smartest action I can take
right now is to report to my
instructor! There's no mistaking that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0059
rows.name:
So, Senpai. I know you just saved
me, but I have another request...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0060
rows.name:
Could you take me with you
all the way back to NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0061
rows.name:
They took all my equipment, so I'm practically
naked, and I've completely lost confidence in my
ability to safely travel across this continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0062
rows.name:
Could you do me this favor while
I'm already being a nuisance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011701_MSG0063
rows.name: Please! Do it for your cute junior...![ST:wait ]
